column4: 4100|Bunker — Blast Door|blood_chrome|A massive blast door, partially open. The hydraulics have failed. You squeeze through.|indoors,dark|||||

column3: 4101|Bunker — Decontamination|blood_chrome|Chemical showers and UV lights. A sign reads: 'ALL PERSONNEL MUST DECONTAMINATE.'|indoors,dark|||||
column4: 4102|Bunker — Reception|blood_chrome|A security desk with shattered monitors. Bullet holes in the wall behind it.|indoors,dark|||||
column5: 4103|Bunker — Armory|blood_chrome|Weapon racks, mostly empty. What remains is experimental. Serial numbers filed off.|indoors,dark|||||

column2: 4104|Bunker — Barracks|blood_chrome|Rows of bunks. Some still have personal effects. Photos of families. Letters never sent.|safe,indoors|||||
column3: 4105|Bunker — Mess Hall|blood_chrome|A cafeteria frozen in time. Trays of petrified food. The vending machine still works somehow.|safe,indoors|||||
column4: 4106|Bunker — Command Center|blood_chrome|A war room with a massive tactical display. Red dots everywhere. The situation was dire.|indoors,dark|||||
column5: 4107|Bunker — Communications|blood_chrome|Radio equipment. Static on every frequency. One channel plays music from decades ago.|indoors,dark|||||
column6: 4108|Bunker — Medical Bay|blood_chrome|An operating theater. Surgical tools laid out. The patient left mid-procedure.|indoors,dark|||||

column2: 4109|Bunker — Generator Room|blood_chrome|Diesel generators hum. Fuel is low. When it runs out, the lights go forever.|indoors,dark|||||
column3: 4110|Bunker — Server Room|blood_chrome|Military servers still processing. Classified data scrolls across screens. Eyes only.|indoors,dark|||||
column4: 4111|Bunker — Research Lab|blood_chrome|Biological containment units. Most are intact. One is broken. The contents are gone.|indoors,dark|||||
column5: 4112|Bunker — Cold Storage|blood_chrome|Freezers at -40. Biological samples. Some are labeled. Some are deliberately unlabeled.|indoors,dark|||||
column6: 4113|Bunker — Escape Tunnel|blood_chrome|A narrow tunnel with emergency lighting. It leads somewhere outside the base perimeter.|indoors,dark|||||

column3: 4114|Sub-Level — Stairwell|blood_chrome|Stairs descend further. The walls change from concrete to bedrock. This wasn't in the plans.|indoors,dark|||||
column4: 4115|Sub-Level — Containment|blood_chrome|A room designed to hold something. The restraints are massive. They've been broken.|indoors,dark|||||
column5: 4116|Sub-Level — Project Room|blood_chrome|Files marked 'PROJECT PROMETHEUS.' Whatever they made, it got out.|indoors,dark|||||

column3: 4117|Deep Storage — Vault|blood_chrome|A bank vault door. Inside: crates marked with radiation symbols and 'DO NOT OPEN UNTIL 2099.'|indoors,dark|||||
column4: 4118|Deep Storage — Archive|blood_chrome|Filing cabinets of classified documents. Decades of secrets. Some pages are redacted entirely.|indoors,dark|||||
column5: 4119|The Pit|blood_chrome|The deepest point. A shaft drilled into the earth. Something is down there. Something is coming up.|indoors,dark|||||
